result.preview:
"SQLite query execution error (DatabaseError): Execution failed on sql 'SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN Pricebook2 pb ON o.Pricebook2Id = pb.Id
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON o.AccountId = c.AccountId
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;': no such table: sales_pipeline.Contract"

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN Pricebook2 pb ON o.Pricebook2Id = pb.Id
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON o.AccountId = c.AccountId
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON o.AccountId = c.AccountId

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.TotalPrice / NULLIF(oi.Quantity, 0)) AS SalesAmount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.TotalPrice / NULLIF(oi.Quantity, 0)) AS SalesAmount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(CAST(oi.Quantity AS DOUBLE) * CAST(oi.TotalPrice AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(CAST(oi.Quantity AS DOUBLE), 0)) AS SalesAmount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(CAST(oi.Quantity AS DOUBLE) * CAST(oi.TotalPrice AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(CAST(oi.Quantity AS DOUBLE), 0)) AS SalesAmount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'

ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
